chosen_views.why: The change is a new module plus additive edits to four existing modules; readers need the responsibility boundaries.
The depth budget and depth report are new in-memory data shapes threaded through the claim plan; their fields and derivation must be explicit.
The gate changes the pass/fail path of the grounded section loop; success and failure (shallow plan) paths must be described.

omitted_views.why: No persisted store; the only on-disk effect is an additive per-section audit block.
Boundary is unchanged from the prior phases; reusing their architecture overview is enough.
